query: DocumentObservation.Container.Text paragraphs lines words transcript boundingRegion
effectiveQuery: DocumentObservation.Container.Text paragraphs lines words transcript boundingRegion
rawText:
### Accessing Document Paragraphs

Source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/vision/documentobservation/container/paragraphs

Retrieves the extracted text from a document container grouped by paragraphs.

```swift
var paragraphs: [DocumentObservation.Container.Text] { get }
```

--------------------------------

### GET lines property

Source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/vision/documentobservation/container/text-swift.struct/lines

Retrieves the text grouped by line from a DocumentObservation.Container instance.

```APIDOC
## lines

### Description
The text grouped by line.

### Availability
iOS 26.0+, iPadOS 26.0+, macOS 26.0+, tvOS 26.0+, visionOS 26.0+

### Declaration
`var lines: [RecognizedTextObservation] { get }`
```

--------------------------------

### DocumentObservation.Container.List.Item.itemString

Source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/vision/documentobservation/container/list/item/itemstring

Retrieves the transcript of the list item, excluding the list marker.

```APIDOC
## Instance Property: itemString

### Description
The transcript of the list item, excluding the list marker.

### Availability
iOS 26.0+ iPadOS 26.0+ macOS 26.0+ tvOS 26.0+ visionOS 26.0+

### Syntax
```swift
var itemString: String { get }
```

### See Also
- `content`: The content of the list item.
- `markerString`: The list marker as a string.
- `markerType`: The style of the list marker.
```

--------------------------------

### Access Document Transcript

Source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/vision/documentobservation/container/text-swift.struct/transcript

Retrieve the complete text content from a document observation container. This property is read-only.

```swift
var transcript: String { get }
```

--------------------------------

### DocumentObservation.Container.words Property

Source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/vision/documentobservation/container/text-swift.struct/words

An instance property that returns individual words in a text container. This property is available on iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, and visionOS starting from version 26.0. Note that Chinese, Japanese, Korean, and Thai languages do not recognize individual words.

```APIDOC
## Instance Property

# words

An instance property that returns individual words in a text container.

iOS 26.0+ iPadOS 26.0+ macOS 26.0+ tvOS 26.0+ visionOS 26.0+

```swift
var words: [RecognizedTextObservation]? { get }
```

### Discussion

Chinese, Japanese, Korean, and Thai don’t recognize individual words.

### See Also

#### Accessing the text

* `var detectedData: [DocumentObservation.Container.DataDetectorMatch]`
  Detected content in the document matched to a specific type of data, such as emails, phone numbers, addresses, and so on.
* `var lines: [RecognizedTextObservation]`
  The text grouped by line.
* `var transcript: String`
  The complete text as a string.
```
